title: Vanilla modpack
description: This is a collection of modifications that expands and improves the gaming experience without significant changes to the game mechanics. It is designed to be played on vanilla servers or in single player mode.
body:
# Description
This modpack was created for the vanilla game. It contains the best optimizing mods at the moment. As well as client mods (client mods are those mods that do not require installation on the server) that will help you in your game.

## Optimization
This modpack is still based on a lot of optimization mods, the main ones being [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mods/sodium) and [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mods/nvidium) (this is a mod that really increases FPS by 2 or 3 times, but if you don't have an Nvidia graphics card, then don't worry, nothing will happen, and only other mods will work on optimization). The modpack also contains many other optimizing mods for a comfortable game. This modpack will run on any computer or laptop, I checked it myself.

# List of modifications
<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

1. [AntiGhost](https://modrinth.com/mod/antighost) — press G to see ghost blocks within a 4 block radius due to fast breaking
2. [Armor Trim Item Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-trim-item-fix) — changes the armor icon to make it clear what kind of trim it currently has
3. [Better Trim Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-trim-tooltips) — condenses the tooltips of Trimmed Armor items
4. [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) — replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD
5. [Broken Lead Warner](https://modrinth.com/mod/broken-lead-warner) — let's you know if your lead breaks
7. [Chest Tracker](https://modrinth.com/mod/chest-tracker) — item storage, remember where you've put things
7. [Chunk fade in](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunks-fade-in) — adds fade-in animation for chunks
7. [ClickThrough Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough+) — allows you to click through the plates and frames without pressing Shift
8. [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) — connects textures, such as glass
8. [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft) — adds emotion. Press B in supported servers
9. [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) — adds dynamic lights
10. [Lighty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lighty) — when you press the F8 key, it shows where there is not enough light
11. [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) — allows you to create schemes for rebuilding buildings
12. [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) — fixes gaps in Block Models and Item Models
12. [Mouse Wheelie](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-wheelie) — improves the handling of the mouse in the inventory
13. [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) — adds more animation
14. [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes) — When crashing, you can go back to the title screen and keep playing, without needing to restart, alongside other things to make crashes more pleasant
16. [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) — adds sounds when walking on different blocks
17. [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) — view the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory
18. [Simple Shulker Preview](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-shulker-preview) — displays a icon indicating the contents of a shulker box, as well as a capacity bar
19. [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound) — adds a wide range of new and improved sound effects
20. [Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars) — improves the display of effects
21. [Why Does My Glass Sound Like That](https://modrinth.com/mod/wdmgslt) — stops the glass sound from breaking your eardrums when you have silk touch
22. [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) — allows you to zoom in on the C key and even more using the mouse wheel

</details>
<details>
<summary>Resource Packs</summary>

1. [Fast Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass) — makes grass and related blocks use the top texture on the sides
2. [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) — make your game like the trailers! Dynamic animated entities to freshen your Minecraft experience
3. [No Z-Fighting](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-z-fighting) — fixes those annoying flickering glitches
4. [Shield Corrections](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shield-corrections) — it can fix broken shield patterns and lowering shield for you
4. [Translations for Sodium](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/translations-for-sodium) — unofficial translations for the Sodium Minecraft mod
5. [xali's Enchanted Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enchanted-books) — atribute custom textures to enchanted books to be more identifiable
6. [xali's Enhanced Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enhanced-vanilla) — improves the nature and adds variability to some blocks
7. [xali's Potions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-potions) — atribute custom textures to potions to be more identifiable

</details>
<details>
<summary>Shaders</summary>

1. [AstraLex Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/astralex)
2. [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)
3. [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
4. [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound)
5. [MakeUp - Ultra Fast](https://modrinth.com/shader/makeup-ultra-fast-shaders)
6. [Photon Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader)
7. [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels)
8. [Solas Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader)

</details>
<details>
<summary>Optimization Mods</summary>

1. [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
2. [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
3. [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)
1. [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
2. [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
3. [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)
3. [Cull less leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-less-leaves)
4. [DinamicFPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
5. [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
6. [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
7. [Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping)
7. [FastAnim](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastanim)
8. [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
9. [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
10. [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
11. [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
12. [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
12. [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu)
13. [Let Me Despawn](https://modrinth.com/plugin/lmd)
13. [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
14. [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix)
15. [More culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
16. [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium)
17. [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
18. [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
19. [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
20. [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)

</details>
